title: Oligochaetochilus cheraphilus
taxonomy: Oligochaetochilus cheraphilus belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is classified as a genus within this family. The exact classification is within the subtribe Goodyerinae. Further, it is part of the tribe Vanilleae within the subtribe Goodyerinae. This plant's classification is specific to the botanical field, with the species being a member of the monocots and angiosperms. Oligochaetochilus cheraphilus is an orchid species with unique characteristics that fit within this classification.
